title: EDM v0.8.2 to v0.8.3 Migration Crosswalk
description: Documents changes from EDM v0.8.2 to v0.8.3: a truth-only patch release (founder decision, 2026-07-21). The Full composite's inline meta block gains source_timestamp, conforming to the canonical meta fragment; the Full profile field count is corrected from the hand-arithmetic 96 to the machine-counted 91; the narrative_archetype description is corrected to the identity-archetype definition (enum untouched at 12); repository documents are regenerated. No enum changes, no field removals, no semantic changes.
overview: v0.8.3 is a truth-only release: it makes the shipped machine and documents agree with each other and with the canonical fragments. The one validation-affecting change is a widening conformance fix — the Full composite schema had omitted meta.source_timestamp (canonical since v0.7.0) from its inline meta block while declaring additionalProperties:false, strict-rejecting a legal field since v0.8.0. Field-relevance review is deferred to 0.9 with usage evidence; new state/compliance record types go via partner profiles and Extensions, never base fragments.

full_composite_source_timestamp_conforma.description: The Full composite's inline meta block omitted source_timestamp under additionalProperties:false, so a full-profile artifact carrying the field failed composite validation even though the canonical shared fragment (schema/fragments/meta.json) has defined it since v0.7.0. The field is now present in the composite, mirroring the fragment definition verbatim (optional, nullable, ISO-8601 UTC).
full_composite_source_timestamp_conforma.before: meta.source_timestamp absent from the composite meta properties; artifacts carrying it rejected by additionalProperties:false

after.description: The timestamp of the original source content, distinct from created_at which marks extraction time

full_composite_source_timestamp_conforma.migration_action: None. Widening only — every artifact that validated under v0.8.2 still validates; artifacts carrying meta.source_timestamp in the Full profile now validate as the fragment always intended.
full_composite_source_timestamp_conforma.note: A fragment $ref was considered and rejected for this release: the shared fragment's required set (source_type, tags; not profile) and nullability differ from the composite's, so replacing the inline block with a $ref would change the pass/fail set. Mirroring keeps the change strictly widening.

full_profile_field_count_corrected.description: definitions.profile_info.field_count and the schema description corrected from 96 to 91. 91 is the machine count of top-level fields across the 10 domains of the v0.8.3 Full composite (meta 17, core 7, constellation 19, milky_way 5, gravity 14, impulse 12, governance 7, telemetry 4, system 2, crosswalks 4). The long-standing 96 was hand-arithmetic that never matched a shipped v0.8 schema.
full_profile_field_count_corrected.migration_action: None. Annotation-only; field_count sits in a non-validating definitions block.

narrative_archetype_description_correcte.description: Description corrected from the role framing ('the structural role or literary trope the subject occupies within the narrative') to the identity-archetype definition per ADR-0030: which of the 12 canonical identity archetypes the subject embodies — an identity, not a structural role or story function. Description only; the enum is untouched at the canonical 12.
narrative_archetype_description_correcte.before: The structural role or literary trope the subject occupies within the narrative
narrative_archetype_description_correcte.after: The archetypal identity the subject embodies — which of the 12 canonical identity archetypes the subject expresses, not a structural role or story function (ADR-0030)

document_changes.description: Non-schema changes shipped with v0.8.3, listed for lineage completeness.
items: CHANGELOG.md: [0.8.2] entry backfilled from schema/crosswalks/v0.8.1_to_v0.8.2.json (v0.8.2 had shipped to npm with no human-facing changelog entry); [0.8.3] entry added
docs/RELEASE-NOTES.md: v0.8.2 and v0.8.3 entries added; version lineage table updated
README.md: version/badge/status to 0.8.3; Full field count 91; per-domain field counts corrected to machine truth; narrative_archetype list corrected to the canonical 12
CITATION.cff: version 0.8.3; DOI points at the concept DOI pending the v0.8.3 Zenodo deposit

Whitepaper regenerated in releases/v0.8.3/: Appendix A from the v0.8.3 spec (12 identity archetypes, identity-not-role definition), field count 91 throughout, source_timestamp attribution corrected to v0.7.0 per crosswalk record
docs/RELEASE-POLICY.md added: one-story release gate (npm + Zenodo publish together; document candidate staged before any npm release; certification claims only cite documented versions)

backward_compatibility.v082_to_v083: All v0.8.2 artifacts are valid v0.8.3 artifacts. The only validation-affecting change widens acceptance (Full-profile artifacts carrying meta.source_timestamp now pass the composite).
backward_compatibility.v083_to_v082: v0.8.3 artifacts are valid under v0.8.2 UNLESS a Full-profile artifact carries meta.source_timestamp, which the v0.8.2 composite strict-rejects (the defect this release fixes).

forward_compatibility.new_extractions: New Full-profile extractions may populate meta.source_timestamp and have it validate against the composite.
forward_compatibility.validation: v0.8.3 validators accept every artifact v0.8.2 validators accept, plus Full-profile artifacts carrying meta.source_timestamp.
